rtk.title: RTK (Rust Token Kill)
steps: Initialize globally: rtk init --global
Follow the on-screen instructions to connect RTK to your assistant (e.g. Claude Code)
Restart your assistant session to enable transparent shell command output compression

caveman.title: Caveman
steps: Compress your assistant's guidelines file: /caveman-compress CLAUDE.md (or your assistant's guideline file)
Use /caveman in your assistant session to enable compact response mode (~65% token reduction)
Use /caveman lite to remove filler words, or /caveman ultra for telegraphic style
Use 'normal mode' to revert to standard responses

token_optimizer.title: Token Optimizer
steps: Install the plugin inside your assistant (e.g., for Claude Code: /plugin install token-optimizer@alexgreensh-token-optimizer)
Run the initial token audit: /token-optimizer
Setup the real-time daemon (optional): python3 ~/.claude/token-optimizer/measure.py setup-daemon
Open dashboard in your browser: http://localhost:24842/token-optimizer

code_review_graph.title: Code Review Graph
steps: Initialize and configure your assistant: code-review-graph install
Build the codebase AST graph: code-review-graph build
Use the generated MCP tools (e.g., detect_changes, get_review_context) in your assistant for token-efficient file reading

graphify.title: Graphify
steps: Connect Graphify to your assistant: graphify install
Generate your knowledge graph: /graphify . (or equivalent run)
Configure your assistant to use the graph first: graphify claude install (or equivalent for your assistant)

opencode.title: OpenCode + Deepseek Setup
steps: Install OpenCode globally: curl -fsSL https://opencode.ai/install | bash
Verify installation: opencode --version
Start a session: opencode (then Tab to switch between Plan and Build modes)
Connect to Deepseek: /connect deepseek (paste your API key when prompted)
Optimize token usage: rtk init -g --opencode
Install Caveman plugin (optional): opencode plugin opencode-caveman -g
Run 'loma init opencode' in your project to scaffold AGENTS.md
Run 'loma optimize opencode' to configure global settings for Deepseek
